rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL ET AL VS. ANNE KIHAGI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Notice To Enforce Stay Pending Appeal Of Orders Striking Defendants Statements Of Disqualification
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 14, 2021 line 1. DEFENDANTS ANNE KIHAGI, JULIA MWANGI, XELAN PROP 1, LLC, RENKA PROP, LLC, NOZARI 2, LLC, ZORIALL, LLC and CHRISTINE MWANGI Notice To Enforce Stay Pending Appeal Of Orders Striking Defendants Statements Of Disqualification is continued to April 20, 2021 for the moving party to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copies of the moving papers. Courtesy copies to be delivered no later than 9:30 a.m. on April 14, 2021 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Untimely replies filed after the deadline authorized by April 1, 2021 order are stricken. =(501/CFH)
